/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ivread.dir/ivread.c++.o -o ivread  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/larsens/Github/sgi-inventor/inventor-sdl2-gles2/../../opengl-for-mac/lib ../../lib/libInventor.a ../../libFL/libFLiv.a ../../libimage/libimage.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libjpeg.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfreetype.dylib /Users/larsens/Github/sgi-inventor/inventor-sdl2-gles2/../../gl4es/lib/libGL-native.a /Users/larsens/Github/sgi-inventor/inventor-sdl2-gles2/../../opengl-for-mac/lib/libGLESv2.dylib /Users/larsens/Github/sgi-inventor/inventor-sdl2-gles2/../../opengl-for-mac/lib/libEGL.dylib /Users/larsens/Github/sgi-inventor/inventor-sdl2-gles2/build-gl4es/glues/libglues-native.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk/usr/lib/libiconv.tbd
